statement: In every magma, Equation 3444 (`x * y = z * (w * (z * u))`) implies Equation 3910 (`x * x = (y * (z * w)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0125
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op z (op w (op z u)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x x) = (op (op y (op z w)) y)
